name: Edictum Rules Enforcement
description: Runtime rules enforcement for AI agent tool calls. Blocks exfiltration, credential theft, destructive commands, and prompt injection.

rulesPath.label: Rules Path
rulesPath.help: Path to a custom YAML ruleset (defaults to the bundled openclaw-rules.yaml)

workflowPath.label: Workflow Path
workflowPath.help: Path to a Workflow YAML definition to enforce alongside the ruleset

mode.label: Enforcement Mode
mode.help: "enforce" blocks violations; "observe" logs them without blocking

serverUrl.label: Control Plane Server URL
serverUrl.help: Edictum Control Plane URL for HITL approvals and audit feeds (optional)

apiKey.label: Control Plane API Key
apiKey.help: API key for connecting to Edictum Control Plane (optional)

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Stable agent identifier for Control Plane fleet monitoring (optional)
